title: phlomoides agraria
intro: Phlomoides agraria, also known as the Asian phlomoides or mountain phlomoides, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the mint family (Lamiaceae). The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Phlomoides agraria include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
